economic_notes: Nation operates multiple business enterprises including Aseneskak Casino (1/6 interest), MCN Economic Development Corporation, MCN Business Centre LP, MCN C-Store & Fuel LP, MCN Cafe LP, and 4915110 Manitoba Limited. Moose Lake Indian Band Development Trust long-term investment valued at $5,090,475.
notes: DISCLAIMER OF OPINION issued by auditor — not a qualified opinion but a full disclaimer due to significant internal control weaknesses across cash, accounts receivable, inventory, long-term investments, tangible capital assets, accounts payable, payroll, revenue, expenditures, and capital projects. Audit report dated May 22, 2024 for fiscal year ended March 31, 2021 — a 3-year delay in reporting. ISC identified recoverable amounts of $470,277 from fiscal years 2001 and prior still under negotiation. Section 95 Housing Project under construction with $1,355,589 incurred and $1,361,676 advanced by CMHC. Community Development segment shows largest deficit at -$2,148,887. No schedule of remuneration disclosed.
